kaggle_note: CSV files under data/benchmark/kaggle/ come from public Kaggle datasets. Run: python scripts/download_kaggle_benchmark_data.py. See benchmarks/kaggle_sources.json for slugs and URLs.

datasets.ml_schema_hint: Sample sales (classic model DB): ORDERNUMBER, QUANTITYORDERED, PRICEEACH, ORDERLINENUMBER, SALES, ORDERDATE, STATUS, QTR_ID, MONTH_ID, YEAR_ID, PRODUCTLINE, MSRP, PRODUCTCODE, CUSTOMERNAME, PHONE, ADDRESSLINE1, ADDRESSLINE2, CITY, STATE, POSTALCODE, COUNTRY, TERRITORY, CONTACTLASTNAME, CONTACTFIRSTNAME, DEALSIZE.

tasks.task: Load the CSV and report row count, column count, and list all column names.
Find the top 3 PRODUCTLINE values by row count and plot a vertical bar chart.
tasks.expected_output: Bar chart of top product lines

tasks.task: Compute mean SALES and mean PRICEEACH across all rows.
Plot a histogram of QUANTITYORDERED.
Compare average SALES for each DEALSIZE category (Small, Medium, Large if present).

Dual-method reconciliation audit: compute total SALES by PRODUCTLINE in two independent ways (A: pandas groupby and B: SQL query via sqlite3 in-memory table). Output both result tables sorted identically, then produce a discrepancy report with max absolute difference, number of mismatched groups, and a root-cause note if differences exist.
tasks.expected_output: Two independent KPI computations and discrepancy report
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if either computation path is missing, sorting differs between outputs, or discrepancy metrics are omitted.

tasks.task: Leakage-controlled forecasting protocol: parse ORDERDATE, build a time-ordered split (earliest 80% train, latest 20% test), and predict SALES using numeric features only. Train a baseline linear model and one stronger nonlinear model, report RMSE and MAE for both on the same holdout, and include a leakage checklist stating which columns were excluded to avoid target leakage.
tasks.expected_output: Time-split baseline vs advanced model with leakage checklist
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if time-split evidence is absent, if fewer than two models are compared on the same holdout, or if leakage checklist is missing.

tasks.task: Reviewer-gated visualization package: deliver exactly three business-relevant charts (trend, segment comparison, and distribution), each saved as PNG with a JSON sidecar containing title, chart_type, x_axis label and values, y_axis label and values, and one-sentence description. Include a QA checklist and revise if any item fails.
tasks.expected_output: Three validated charts with complete sidecars and QA checklist
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if chart count is not exactly three, any sidecar field is missing, or QA checklist lacks explicit pass/fix evidence.

tasks.task: Train two models to predict DEALSIZE from numeric features: a baseline logistic regression and a stronger tree-based model. Use the same split, report macro-F1 and confusion matrix for both, and provide a short decision note on which model to deploy and why.
tasks.expected_output: Model comparison with macro-F1, confusion matrices, and decision note
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if models use different splits, if either confusion matrix is missing, or if deployment decision is not justified.

tasks.task: Robustness stress test: compute country-level total SALES rankings before and after winsorizing SALES at the 1st/99th percentiles. Report rank shifts for top 10 countries and explain the largest change.
tasks.expected_output: Before/after ranking comparison with shift explanation
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both pre and post rankings are not shown, if rank-shift table is absent, or if largest-shift explanation is missing.

tasks.task: Run reproducibility contract: with fixed random seed, train the same nonlinear model twice on the same split for SALES prediction and prove metric stability (RMSE/MAE deltas). Then rerun with a different seed and discuss variance risk.
tasks.expected_output: Seed-stability report with metric deltas and variance note
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if fixed-seed repeat is not demonstrated, if deltas are missing, or if alternate-seed variance discussion is absent.

tasks.task: Perform segment fairness-style error slicing on the SALES model by PRODUCTLINE and COUNTRY: report per-segment MAE, identify worst three segments, and provide remediation hypotheses.
tasks.expected_output: Segmented error table and remediation hypotheses
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both PRODUCTLINE and COUNTRY slices are not evaluated, if worst segments are not identified, or if remediation hypotheses are generic.

tasks.task: Failure-mode narrative: for a SALES prediction model, list the top 10 largest absolute-error rows with key feature context, cluster the error causes into at least three categories, and end with an action plan to reduce each category.
tasks.expected_output: Top-error audit with categorized failure modes and action plan
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if top-error rows are missing, if fewer than three error categories are provided, or if no category-specific action plan is included.

datasets.ml_schema_hint: Stroke prediction: id, gender, age, hypertension, heart_disease, ever_married, work_type, Residence_type, avg_glucose_level, bmi, smoking_status, stroke (0/1 target).

tasks.task: Summarize dataset shape and dtypes.
Count rows by gender and plot a bar chart.
Mean and median age overall.
Histogram of avg_glucose_level.
Average age for stroke=1 vs stroke=0.

Dual-method prevalence reconciliation: compute stroke prevalence by work_type using (A) pandas groupby and (B) SQL query in sqlite3 after loading the dataframe. Compare both tables row-by-row and report max absolute difference.
tasks.expected_output: Two prevalence tables and discrepancy report
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if either method is missing, if rows are not aligned for comparison, or if discrepancy metric is missing.

tasks.task: Leakage-controlled stroke prediction: build a train/test split, train logistic regression baseline and a nonlinear tree-based classifier on the same split, and report accuracy, macro-F1, and ROC-AUC with explicit class-imbalance note.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if models are not compared on the same split, if macro-F1 or ROC-AUC is missing, or if imbalance is not explicitly discussed.

tasks.task: Reviewer-gated clinical visualization package: create exactly three charts (risk by age bands, risk by work_type, distribution of avg_glucose_level by stroke status). Save PNG plus JSON sidecar for each chart with required schema fields and include QA checklist with pass/fix status.
tasks.expected_output: Three QA-validated charts with complete sidecars
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if not exactly three charts, if any sidecar misses required keys, or if QA checklist lacks explicit per-chart validation.

tasks.task: Missing-data robustness test: run stroke model pipeline under two strategies for bmi (median imputation and model-based imputation proxy), compare holdout metrics and calibration gaps, and state preferred strategy with safety rationale.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both imputation strategies are not executed, if calibration comparison is missing, or if recommendation lacks rationale.

tasks.task: Fairness slice audit: report false-negative rate and recall for stroke=1 across gender and Residence_type groups, flag worst-performing slice, and provide concrete mitigation ideas.
tasks.expected_output: Group fairness metrics and mitigation plan
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both grouping dimensions are not analyzed, if FNR/recall metrics are absent, or if mitigation actions are not concrete.

tasks.task: Reproducibility contract for stroke classifier: train the same nonlinear model twice with fixed seed and once with a different seed; report metric deltas and stability conclusion.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if repeat-with-same-seed evidence is absent, if delta metrics are not reported, or if stability conclusion is missing.

tasks.task: Error forensics: list top 10 false negatives and top 10 false positives with key feature context (age, bmi, glucose, comorbidities), cluster errors into at least three cause categories, and recommend targeted data or model fixes.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if either FN or FP list is missing, if fewer than three error categories are used, or if recommendations are not category-specific.

tasks.task: Threshold governance task: optimize decision threshold for stroke screening under recall >= 0.85 constraint, report precision/recall/F1 at chosen threshold, and provide a one-paragraph clinical risk trade-off note.
tasks.expected_output: Constraint-based threshold selection with trade-off note
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if recall constraint is not enforced, if threshold-specific metrics are missing, or if clinical trade-off note is absent.

datasets.ml_schema_hint: Bank marketing (UCI): age, job, marital, education, default, housing, loan, contact, month, day_of_week, duration, campaign, pdays, previous, poutcome, emp.var.rate, cons.price.idx, cons.conf.idx, euribor3m, nr.employed, y (yes/no subscription).

tasks.task: Report number of rows and columns.
Subscription rate: proportion where y is yes.
Histogram of age.
Bar chart of counts by job.
Mean duration for y=yes vs y=no.
Dual-method KPI reconciliation: compute subscription rate by month using (A) pandas groupby and (B) sqlite3 SQL. Align outputs and report max absolute difference and mismatched month count.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if either method is absent, if aligned comparison is missing, or if discrepancy statistics are omitted.

tasks.task: Leakage-aware classification protocol: predict y using stratified split with logistic baseline and gradient-boosted tree model on the same holdout. Report accuracy, macro-F1, PR-AUC, and a leakage checklist of excluded columns.
tasks.expected_output: Two-model classification protocol with leakage checklist
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if holdout is inconsistent, if PR-AUC is missing, or if excluded-column checklist is missing.

tasks.task: Reviewer-gated chart bundle: produce exactly three business charts (conversion by month, conversion by contact type, duration distribution by outcome) with PNG and mandatory JSON sidecar schema, then include per-chart QA pass/fix checklist.
tasks.expected_output: Three validated charts with sidecars and QA evidence
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if not exactly three charts, if any sidecar is schema-incomplete, or if checklist is non-verifiable.

tasks.task: Class-imbalance stress test: compare baseline model without balancing vs balanced strategy (class weights or resampling) on same split; report macro-F1, recall for positive class, and uplift table.
tasks.expected_output: Imbalance strategy comparison with uplift table
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both strategies are not run, if positive-class recall is missing, or if uplift table is absent.

tasks.task: Fairness slice audit: compute precision, recall, and false-positive rate across age bands and marital groups; identify worst two slices and propose mitigations.
tasks.expected_output: Slice-level fairness metrics and mitigation actions
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both slice dimensions are not included, if any required metric is missing, or if mitigation is not actionable.

tasks.task: Reproducibility contract: rerun the same nonlinear classifier twice with fixed seed and once with different seed; report metric deltas and whether model ranking versus baseline is stable.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if same-seed repeat is missing, if deltas are not reported, or if ranking-stability statement is absent.

tasks.task: Failure-mode analysis: extract top 15 misclassified rows with key call-center context (duration, campaign, pdays, month, contact), categorize at least three error patterns, and map each pattern to one concrete corrective action.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if top errors are missing, if fewer than three patterns are defined, or if actions are not mapped per pattern.

tasks.task: Threshold governance under business constraint: choose threshold maximizing macro-F1 while keeping positive-class recall >= 0.70, and provide confusion matrix and business trade-off paragraph.
tasks.expected_output: Constraint-based threshold choice with matrix and trade-off
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if recall constraint is violated or unverified, if confusion matrix is missing, or if trade-off discussion is absent.

datasets.ml_schema_hint: Student math (UCI): school, sex, age, address, famsize, Pstatus, Medu, Fedu, Mjob, Fjob, reason, guardian, traveltime, studytime, failures, schoolsup, famsup, paid, activities, nursery, higher, internet, romantic, famrel, freetime, goout, Dalc, Walc, health, absences, G1, G2, G3.

tasks.task: Dataset shape and column list.
Bar chart of student counts by school.
Mean final grade G3 by sex.
Histogram of studytime.
Mean Walc (weekend alcohol) by romantic yes vs no.
Dual-method grade reconciliation: compute mean G3 by school and sex using (A) pandas and (B) sqlite3 SQL, align both outputs, then report max absolute difference and mismatched groups.
tasks.expected_output: Two reconciled group-mean tables and discrepancy report
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if either method is missing, if grouping keys are inconsistent, or if discrepancy metrics are missing.

tasks.task: Leakage-controlled grade prediction: predict G3 with and without leakage-prone features G1/G2 using same split, compare RMSE/MAE, and include a leakage checklist that justifies final feature set.
tasks.expected_output: Leakage comparison and final feature-policy note
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both variants are not run on same split, if metric comparison is missing, or if leakage checklist is absent.

tasks.task: Reviewer-gated visualization package: create exactly three charts (performance trend by studytime, risk by failures buckets, lifestyle vs grades distribution), each with PNG plus required JSON sidecar schema and explicit QA pass/fix checklist.
tasks.expected_output: Three QA-validated education charts with sidecars
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if chart count is not exactly three, if any sidecar field is missing, or if QA checklist is incomplete.

tasks.task: Model comparison contract: train linear regression baseline and one nonlinear regressor for G3 on same split, report RMSE/MAE/R2, then provide residual diagnostics summary with top 3 bias patterns.
tasks.expected_output: Baseline vs nonlinear regression with residual-bias summary
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if any metric is missing for either model, if split differs, or if residual-bias patterns are not explicit.

tasks.task: Robustness test under outlier trimming: evaluate G3 model before and after trimming absences above 99th percentile, report metric deltas and whether ranking of models changes.
tasks.expected_output: Outlier robustness report with model-ranking impact
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if before/after experiments are missing, if delta metrics are absent, or if ranking-change statement is omitted.

tasks.task: Fairness slice audit for pass/fail classifier derived from G3>=10: report precision, recall, and FNR across sex and school groups, identify worst slice, and recommend mitigation.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both group dimensions are not evaluated, if required metrics are missing, or if mitigation lacks specificity.

tasks.task: Error forensics: list top 12 absolute-error predictions with student context (studytime, failures, absences, lifestyle fields), cluster into at least three failure causes, and map each cause to one remediation step.
tasks.expected_output: Top-error table with cause clusters and remediation mapping
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if top errors are not listed, if fewer than three cause clusters are present, or if remediation mapping is missing.

tasks.task: Reproducibility governance: run nonlinear grade model twice with fixed seed and once with alternate seed, report RMSE/MAE variance and confidence note on deployment stability.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if same-seed rerun evidence is missing, if variance stats are absent, or if deployment-stability note is not provided.

datasets.ml_schema_hint: Bike sharing daily: instant, dteday, season, yr, mnth, holiday, weekday, workingday, weathersit, temp, atemp, hum, windspeed, casual, registered, cnt.

tasks.task: Report shape and list columns.
Bar chart of mean cnt by season.
Histogram of windspeed.
Scatter temp vs cnt.
Mean registered rides by workingday (0 vs 1).
Dual-method demand reconciliation: compute mean cnt by season and weathersit via (A) pandas pivot/groupby and (B) sqlite3 SQL; align and report max absolute difference plus mismatch count.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both methods are not used, if output alignment is missing, or if discrepancy metrics are not reported.

tasks.task: Leakage-controlled forecasting-style evaluation: sort by dteday, train on earliest 80% and test on latest 20%, compare linear baseline and nonlinear regressor for cnt, and report RMSE/MAE for both.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if chronological split is not evidenced, if fewer than two models are compared, or if both RMSE and MAE are missing.

tasks.task: Reviewer-gated mobility chart package: produce exactly three charts (time trend, weather segment comparison, demand distribution) with PNG and required JSON sidecars, followed by checklist with pass/fix entries per chart.
tasks.expected_output: Three validated mobility charts with sidecars
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if chart count differs from three, if sidecar schema is incomplete, or if checklist is not explicit per chart.

tasks.task: Robustness stress test: train cnt model with and without extreme weather days (top 2% windspeed or humidity), report metric deltas and explain which feature effects change most.
tasks.expected_output: Extreme-weather robustness comparison and effect-shift note
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both scenarios are not executed, if metric deltas are absent, or if feature-effect change is not discussed.

tasks.task: Segment fairness-style slice audit on prediction error: compute MAE by season and workingday groups, identify worst three slices, and give concrete operational mitigations.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both slice dimensions are not analyzed, if worst slices are not identified, or if mitigations are vague.

tasks.task: Reproducibility contract: rerun nonlinear cnt model twice with fixed seed and once with alternate seed, then report RMSE/MAE variance and whether model ranking against baseline is stable.
tasks.expected_output: Seed stability and ranking consistency report
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if repeated fixed-seed run is missing, if variance metrics are absent, or if ranking stability is not concluded.

tasks.task: Failure-mode narrative: list top 10 largest absolute-error days with date and weather context, group into at least three error archetypes, and provide one remediation per archetype.
tasks.expected_output: Top-error day audit with archetypes and remediations
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if top-error list is missing, if fewer than three archetypes are defined, or if remediations are not archetype-specific.

tasks.task: Constraint-based high-demand classifier: predict cnt above 75th percentile and choose threshold maximizing F1 while maintaining recall >= 0.80. Report threshold, confusion matrix, and risk trade-off note.
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if recall constraint is not checked, if confusion matrix is missing, or if trade-off note is absent.
